description_long: This is a two-story modern suburban house with a dark exterior, featuring a combination of horizontal siding and large windows. The property is enclosed by a wooden fence and includes a driveway leading to a single-car garage, as well as a paved walkway to the main entrance. The backyard is equipped with a rectangular swimming pool, a circular above-ground pool, and a raised deck with glass railings. The landscaping includes several trees, green lawns, and decorative stone borders along the house. The roof is a complex hip style with multiple slopes, and the windows are arranged in both symmetrical and asymmetrical patterns. The main entryway is accentuated by a covered porch, steps, and a prominent front door with sidelights.
description: A modern two-story house with dark siding, large windows, a hip roof, fenced yard, pools, and landscaped greenery.
description_view_0: Rear view showing the backyard with a rectangular pool, above-ground pool, raised deck, and brick patio.
description_view_1: Side view highlighting the garage, driveway, front lawn, and trees, with the backyard pools partially visible.
description_view_2: Front view displaying the main entrance, garage, walkway, and symmetrical landscaping with trees and flower beds.
description_view_3: Opposite side view focusing on the raised deck with glass railings, backyard pools, and the side of the house.
attribute_window_arrangement: asymmetrical placement with large and small rectangular windows
attribute_entryway_design: Covered porch with steps, prominent single front door with sidelights, and landscaped approach
